waste_points: One failed manifest-generation command due PowerShell array syntax; recovered with scoped rerun.
missing_tools: No dedicated Officio schema validator yet for role packs/checker reports in CI.
future_prompt_improvements: Provide explicit allowed write paths/forbidden paths in TASK.json to reduce admission ambiguity.
Provide fixture expected statuses in dossier for deterministic checker tuning.
future_gate_or_checklist_recommendations: Add deterministic preflight checklist artifact file generation before edits.
Add schema check gate for Officio role packs and checker outputs.
